slides.headline: Master Yellow Ribbon Administration
slides.body: Learn best practices for tracking, calculating, and certifying YRP benefits.

slides.headline: Understand YRP Eligibility
slides.body: Identify students who qualify for Yellow Ribbon benefits.

slides.headline: Track YRP Applications
slides.body: Maintain accurate records of YRP applications.

slides.headline: Calculate YRP Benefits
slides.body: Determine the amount of Yellow Ribbon benefits a student qualifies for.

slides.headline: Certify YRP Benefits
slides.body: Submit Yellow Ribbon benefits to the VA for approval.

slides.headline: Monitor and Update
slides.body: Keep track of YRP benefits and update records as necessary.
Learn more about YRP best practices and automate your workflow. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Master Yellow Ribbon administration with these best practices. Learn how to track, calculate, and certify YRP benefits for student veterans. Link in bio to start automating your workflow and mastering YRP administration.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 4, as it could benefit from a more concise headline to match the other steps.
